landing.heroSubtitle: Welcome to a universe of original masterworks. Discover aesthetics that define emotions and elevate spaces to galleries.
landing.featuredSubtitle: An exclusive glimpse into my latest and most treasured creations. Move closer. Feel the strokes.
landing.artistQuote: "I create pieces that bridge the gap between traditional technique and contemporary emotion."
landing.artistBio: With over a decade of devotion to fine arts, every canvas paints a silent narrative. My calling is to capture moments that language fails, translating raw emotion into tangible beauty.

collections.heroSubtitle: Enter thematic spaces. Each collection represents a distinct emotional journey and aesthetic vision through original masterworks.
collections.noMasterworks: No masterworks discovered in this room yet.

allProducts.heroSubtitle: Browse through my complete collection of artworks. Each piece is available for purchase and comes with a certificate of authenticity.
allProducts.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, theme, or collection...
allProducts.noMasterworksDesc: The archives could not find any artwork matching your criteria. Try a different keyword or clear your filters.

about.bio1: Every stroke of the brush is a whisper of my soul on a silent canvas. I started my journey looking for a way to freeze moments that words could never accurately describe.
about.bio2: My artworks are born from the chaotic yet beautiful intersections of human emotion, nature's raw power, and the memories we leave behind. The canvas is not just a surface; it's an archive of emotional states.
about.doctrineSubtitle: My creative process is a delicate balance between meticulous technique and raw, unbridled intuition. This is how the magic happens.
about.observationDesc: Before the brush touches the canvas, I spend days absorbing the subject. It's about seeing beyond the physical form and capturing the essence of the atmosphere.
about.colorMappingDesc: Colors possess their own vocabulary. I curate specific palettes that resonate with the mood, treating dark and cold tones with the same reverence as vibrant highlights.
about.executionDesc: The final stage is deeply physical. Layers of texture are built up, scraped away, and reimagined until the canvas perfectly mirrors the emotion I set out to portray.
about.commissionDesc: Whether you are a collector looking to acquire an original piece or interested in commissioning a custom masterwork tailored to your space, my studio is open for dialogue.

contact.heroSubtitle: I'd love to hear from you. Whether you're interested in acquiring a masterwork, commissioning a custom piece, or exploring an exhibition opportunity.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Provide details about your interest or specific requests...
contact.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.phase1Desc: Initial studio consultation to discuss your specific vision, dimensions, and preferred color logic.
contact.phase2Desc: Creation and approval of concept sketches and exact timeline commitments.
contact.phase3Desc: The masterpiece is brought to life. You receive exclusive studio progress updates.
contact.phase4Desc: Final artwork is cured, varnished, authenticated, and securely shipped globally.

subscription.step1Desc: Subscribe to our newsletter and be the first to know about new collections, exclusive pieces, and upcoming exhibitions.
subscription.step2Desc: We sent a verification code to your email. Please enter it below to confirm.
subscription.step3Desc: Your subscription has been verified successfully. You will now receive exclusive updates from Studio Carmen.

notFound.title: A Vanished Masterpiece
notFound.subtitle: The page you seek has either transitioned or become part of the infinite void. Perhaps it is time to return to the familiar rooms of the studio?
